task_completion.description: Enable 24/7 continuous recording on all three cameras
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Camera Settings dialog, specifically the 'Recording' tab. The schedule grid should be completely filled (typically indicating continuous/always recording) for the 'Parking Lot Camera', 'Entrance Camera', and 'Server Room Camera'.
Look for the User Settings dialog for the login 'security.operator'. The 'Full Name' field must read 'Night Watch Commander' and the 'Email' field must read 'nightwatch@facility-security.com'.
Look for the User Settings dialog or user list showing a new user with the login 'incident.cmdr', Full Name 'Incident Commander', and Email 'incident@facility-security.com'.

task_completion.description: Assign the 'Viewer' role to the new incident commander
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the role or permissions settings for the 'incident.cmdr' user showing that the 'Viewer' role has been selected or assigned.

task_completion.description: Create a layout named 'Incident Command Center' with the three cameras
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a layout tab or view named 'Incident Command Center' in the main viewing area. It should contain the video feeds or camera items for 'Parking Lot Camera', 'Entrance Camera', and 'Server Room Camera'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Nx Witness GUI (web or desktop client) to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Nx Witness interface being actively used, rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or python scripts.

integrity.description: The changes are reflected in the actual application state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs for users, roles, and layouts should be visible inside the proper Nx Witness dialog boxes and resource trees, not just typed into a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the application UI to modify the backend directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No screenshots should show SQLite or direct database modification commands in a terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target user to update: 'security.operator' -> Full Name: 'Night Watch Commander', Email: 'nightwatch@facility-security.com'. New user to create: Login: 'incident.cmdr', Full Name: 'Incident Commander', Email: 'incident@facility-security.com', Role: 'Viewer'. Layout to create: 'Incident Command Center' containing exactly 3 cameras: 'Parking Lot Camera', 'Entrance Camera', and 'Server Room Camera'. Recording schedule for all 3 cameras must be set to continuous 24/7 (always recording).
